title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
friendlyTitle: NVIDIA SkillSpector checks whether agent skills are safe
summary: SkillSpector is a security scanner for AI-agent skills that detects malicious patterns, vulnerabilities, data exfiltration risks, prompt injection issues, privilege escalation paths, and MCP-related risks. It supports repositories, URLs, ZIP files, directories, single files, and output formats such as JSON, Markdown, and SARIF.
friendlySummary: SkillSpector scans AI-agent skills for risky code and malicious patterns. It can produce reports that developers can review manually or wire into CI.
whyItMatters: Use it before installing third-party agent skills or adding skills to CI review. It gives teams a practical supply-chain check for the growing ecosystem of agent extensions.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If you install skills for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, or similar agents, this gives you a safety scan before trusting them with your machine.
